schema_output.scene_title: Ḥassān Confronts ʿ Abdullāh ibn al-Ziba ʿ rā

schema_output.moral_lesson: importance of speaking truth to power

schema_output.narrative_text: Ḥassān stood before ʿ Abdullāh ibn al-Ziba ʿ rā, his voice firm and confident as he recited a line of poetry, challenging the powerful leader to confront the truth.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A serene and vast 7th century Arabian Desert landscape with a few palm trees swaying gently in the breeze. Late afternoon sunlight casts a warm golden glow across the scene. In the center of the composition, a tall, slender man with dark beige thobe and lighter beige woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering stands facing a medium-built man with a simple white thobe and brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering. The man in the white thobe points at the other man with a confident expression, his hand extended in a direct gesture. The man in the dark beige thobe looks on, his face not visible from behind. A subtle desert breeze stirs the palm fronds and carries the sound of a distant camel's call. Medium shot from a slightly elevated angle. Warm beige, golden, and turquoise palette with the dark beige and brown as color anchors. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
